text:
Both use CH343. The results are the same on both.

ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1
https://www.aliexpress.com/item/1005006467704200.html

ESP32-C6
https://www.aliexpress.com/item/1005007086080362.html

I'll test the driver on the classic arduino nano v3 (type C plug, but the chips on the board are the same, CH340).
